_comment: Outcome pools for Order Prompt investigations. 50% nothing, 30% small reward, 15% event chain, 5% danger. Pre-rolled before player sees prompt.

nothing.text: A rabbit bolts from the underbrush. False alarm.
You find nothing of interest. Time wasted, but at least you were thorough.
Tracks lead nowhere. Whoever was here is long gone.
Your imagination. The camp is quiet.

small_reward.text: You find a coin purse dropped by a careless traveler.
An abandoned pack contains useful supplies.
A fellow soldier saw you checking the perimeter. Word gets around.
Hidden cache of spare equipment. The quartermaster will be pleased.
You learn something useful from the situation.

event_chain.text: You find a deserter from another company, hiding in the brush...
A wounded soldier lies hidden in the grass, barely alive...
An old man approaches with a tale of hidden treasure nearby...
You overhear something you shouldn't. This could be valuable... or dangerous.

danger.text: Ambush! Bandits were waiting in the bushes!
You step into a concealed pit. Your ankle twists painfully.
An enemy scout! You exchange blows before they flee.
Poisonous snake! You react just in time, but the bite still burns.
